exercises.name: Ez Bar Biceps Curl With Arm Blaster
instructions: Load the EZ-bar with an appropriate weight and grip it firmly.
Pre-engage the biceps before initiating the movement.
Perform the movement in a controlled manner, keeping good form.
Return to the starting position controlling the eccentric phase.
Breathe: exhale on effort, inhale on the way back.
